name: Spicy Country-Style Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 small Fresh green or red chiles
1 large Red or green bell pepper
2 tbsp Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. CUT THE CHICKEN BREASTS into shreds about 3 inches long.
2. Cut the fresh chiles in half, carefully remove the seeds and shred the chiles.
3. Prepare all the vegetables: rinse the bamboo shoots in clean water and shred them; trim the zucchini and shred it; wash the bell pepper, remove the seeds and shred it too.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet. When it is almost smoking, quickly stir-fry the chicken shreds for 1 minute or until the chicken is slightly firm. Remove the cooked chicken and drain it.
5. Wipe the wok clean. Reheat it and add the rest of the oil. When it is hot, add the shredded chiles, bamboo shoots, zucchini, and bell pepper. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
6. Add the remaining ingredients (chicken stock, rice wine or dry sherry, chili bean sauce, granulated sugar, dark soy sauce, Chinese black rice vinegar =OR= cider vinegar, tomato paste). Mix well and stir-fry for another minute.
7. Return the chicken shreds and give the mixture a few quick stirs to finish cooking the chicken.
8. Turn onto a serving platter and serve at once.
